name: engineering-board
description: The board is the database: a git-committed kanban board your AI agents run and remember. Eleven MCP tools over a committed markdown board.
long_description: A zero-dependency MCP server exposing the engineering-board plugin's markdown board as tools: scaffold boards, create/list/update entries, rebuild the index, capture findings, and claim/release entry locks — all against the exact on-disk format the plugin's hooks and skills expect. Pure python3, no third-party dependencies.
